titles.title: My life is yours to control

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: With my whole heart I humbly seek you Now use my life o Lord I pray I yield my stubborn will completely May your commandments light my way

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My life Lord is yours to control I give you my heart and my soul I'll seek your will never mine Rich treasure to find Give wisdom to choices I make Along every path that I take And when I complete life's race Well done, You will say

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Your word has promised me the victr'y And all I need to do is claim Your strength to sour with wings as eagles To walk to run and not to faint
